name: Cranberry Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Coat a 9x5x3-inch loaf pan with nonstick cooking spray; set aside.
3. Sift flour, sugar, baking powder, soda, and salt into a large mixing bowl.
4. Add shortening and use a pastry blender to cut it in until the mixture resembles cornmeal.
5. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
6. Mix orange juice and zest with egg, then pour into the well.
7. Stir lightly just enough to moisten the batter.
8. Fold in cranberries and nuts, stirring gently.
9. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan, smoothing well to the corners and making it slightly higher around the edge than in the middle.
10. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Cool bread in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then loosen around the edges and turn out onto a rack. Cool to room temperature before slicing.
